sections.paragraph:
Original: חרטם

Transliteration: charṭôm

Phonetic: khar-tome'

BDB Definition:

  1. diviner, magician, astrologer
    1. engraver, writer (only in derivative sense of one possessed of occult knowledge)

Origin: from the same as H2747

TWOT entry: 738b

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
